name: Reply to emails with AI using Gmail and Claude
description: Lists recent Gmail messages, uses Claude AI to analyze each email and generate context-aware reply drafts matching a specified tone and style, sends the replies via Gmail, and reports activity to Slack.

source.originalName: Reply to Outlook emails with OpenAI

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails

gmailSendKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending replies

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for email reply notifications

sampleReplies.description: Sample email replies to train the AI on your writing style

senderName.description: Your name for the email signature

steps.name: Extract email content for reply generation
Build Claude prompt for reply generation
Generate email replies with Claude AI
Build Slack notification for sent replies
